name: Gnana Phanideep P.
title: Senior Engineer
text:
When facing tight deadlines for integrating new data sources, I prioritize clear communication around the importance of validation. I view validation as non-negotiable — it’s essential to ensure the accuracy, consistency, and reliability of the integrated data. 

I proactively share a concise validation plan with stakeholders, outlining the specific checks being performed and how they protect data quality. By demonstrating the impact of validation on downstream analytics and decision-making, I help stakeholders understand why this step is critical and requires adequate time. This approach aligns expectations with the reality of data integration, promotes transparency, and reinforces our shared commitment to delivering trustworthy results.…see moreLike6
